caption: A group of men sits on a long wooden bench outdoors in front of a textured brick wall and sandy ground. One man, wearing a red jacket and dark pants, sits on the left with his hand to his chin. Beside him, another man in a dark blue jacket sits facing right. Two other men sit to the right; one wears a white jacket with red accents and green pants, while the last wears a white jacket and a dark baseball cap. In the initial sequence, a man in a patterned brown shirt and khaki pants walks past the group from left to right, exiting the frame. As he leaves, the remaining men remain seated and still. White subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, stating "In just a few minutes, our lives changed." and later, "We had a life and responsibilities in the Congo that we no longer have here."
